data.title: Top Wall Street Forecasters Revamp Evergy Price Expectations Ahead Of Q2 Earnings
TerrAscend's Q2 2024 Results: Keeps 48.6% Of Revenue As Profit, EBITDA Margin Increases
data.description: TerrAscend Corp. (OTC: TSNDF) reported net revenue of $77.5 million for the second quarter of 2024, reflecting a 7.5% increase compared to $72.1 million in the same period in 2023.

data.title: GrowGeneration's Q2 Revenue Jumps 11.8% - Can Restructuring Drive Profits?
data.description: GrowGeneration Corp. (NASDAQ: GRWG), a distributor of products for indoor and outdoor hydroponic and organic gardening, reported second-quarter net revenue of $53.5 million on Thursday afternoon, reflecting an 11.8% increase quarter-over-quarter.

data.title: Mohamed El-Erian Slams Bank Of Japan's Soft Tone: Pushes For Reduction Of Risky Yen Carry Trades
data.description: Mohamed El-Erian, the Chief Economic Advisor at Allianz, has raised concerns about Japan's economic stability. This comes in the wake of the Bank of Japan's recent dovish signals.

data.title: Trump Wants A Say In Interest Rate Decisions Made By Federal Reserve: 'I Think I Have A Better Instinct'
